title: HeadObject, GetObject, Conditions, Ranges, and Cleanup · Language Lens: Conditional Download
summary: A download service calls GET to discover metadata, leaks response bodies, retries after sending headers, and returns full private objects for malformed ranges. Predict the representation, storage, trust, cost, and recovery evidence before inspecting a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the conditional download increment in bounded S3 download decision and cleanup flow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Map application validators and preconditions to S3 requests and preserve 304, 412, not-found, and version-specific meaning.
Check response and metadata, own and close the body, propagate cancellation, handle partial reads, and distinguish transport from caller writes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Predict Conditional Download · Theory Conditional Download
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Go file-delivery team handles case 7237 during a compliance restore drill. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate a versioned conditional range and prove S3 response-body cleanup; keep browser execution deterministic and move AWS claims to an authorized transfer gate; then change cache and retrieval cost assumptions and defend the new budget result. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Map application validators and preconditions to S3 requests and preserve 304, 412, not-found, and version-specific meaning.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Conditional Download contract for the supplied data.

steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and Go Bound Conditional Download · Theory Conditional Download
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Go file-delivery team handles case 2380 during a high-traffic evidence intake window. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate a versioned conditional range and prove S3 response-body cleanup; do not treat an ETag, CORS result, emulator, or successful SDK call as stronger proof than it is; then cancel halfway through and prove every body, part, and goroutine reaches a terminal state. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, databases, credentials, host state, race and leak checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Map application validators and preconditions to S3 requests and preserve 304, 412, not-found, and version-specific meaning.
